inputs.text:
This video is a static text-and-image template with a background using soft blue-purple gradient tones, creating a serene, profound, and philosophical atmosphere. At the top of the frame, the title "How to Become a Millionaire" is presented in a prominent white font, with a minimalist horizontal line beneath it serving as a visual divider.

The middle area features a semi-transparent light-colored dialog box containing the quote: "The small accumulations and choices in daily life are what truly shape your future." The text is concise and powerful, emphasizing the importance of long-term thinking and small decisions; double quotation marks flank both sides, enhancing the authoritative feel of the statement.

Two groups of information are distributed at the bottom left and right: the left side is labeled "@Pixelle.AI" with the subtitle "Open Source Omnimodal AI Creative Agent," indicating that the content is generated by an open-source AI creative agent; the right side displays "Pixelle-Video Text Only Template," explaining that this is a pure-text-style video template. The overall layout is symmetrical and balanced, with a modern and professional design.

A few green leaf patterns adorn the edges of the frame, forming natural, breath-like decorative elements against the blue background and adding a touch of vitality and humanistic flair. The entire interface has no dynamic effects or characters appearing, purely conveying the core idea of wealth growth through color, composition, and copywriting—true success comes from the accumulated details of daily life and wise choices. It is suitable for personal development short videos, financial education, or inspirational sharing scenarios, offering both aesthetic quality and practical value.
